title: New on Agent Artifacts: 50 Products Across 7 Verticals
excerpt: We just added 50 new assets — 30 free downloads and 20 paid products spanning Data & Analytics, Education, Healthcare, Human Resources, Legal, Product Management, Security & Compliance.
content:
We are excited to share **50 new products** now available on Agent Artifacts.

This batch includes **30 free assets** you can download immediately and **20 paid products** for teams ready to go deeper.

The new additions cover **7 verticals**: Data & Analytics, Education, Healthcare, Human Resources, Legal, Product Management, Security & Compliance.

---

## What's New

### Prompts (16 new)

| Product | Type | Price |
|---------|------|-------|
| [Lesson Plan Generator Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-lesson-plan-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [Quiz & Assessment Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-quiz-assessment-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [Job Description Writer Prompts](/products/prompt-job-description-writer) | Prompt | Free |
| [Interview Question Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-interview-question-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [User Story Writer Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-user-story-writer) | Prompt | Free |
| [Roadmap Planning Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-roadmap-planner-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [Threat Modeling Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-threat-model-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [Audit Preparation Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-audit-prep-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [SQL Query Generator Prompts](/products/prompt-sql-query-gen-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [Data Quality Check Prompts](/products/prompt-data-quality-check) | Prompt | Free |
| [Contract Review Starter Prompts](/products/prompt-contract-review-starter) | Prompt | Free |
| [Clinical Documentation Prompts](/products/prompt-clinical-doc-pack) | Prompt | Free |
| [Curriculum Design Prompt Suite](/products/prompt-curriculum-design-suite) | Prompt | $39 |
| [Performance Review Prompt Suite](/products/prompt-performance-review-suite) | Prompt | $39 |
| [Competitive Analysis Prompt Chain](/products/prompt-competitive-analysis-chain) | Prompt | $49 |
| [Clinical Pathway Prompt Suite](/products/prompt-clinical-pathway-suite) | Prompt | $49 |

### Skills (11 new)

| Product | Type | Price |
|---------|------|-------|
| [Rubric Generator Skill](/products/skill-rubric-generator) | Skill | Free |
| [Resume Parser Skill](/products/skill-resume-parser) | Skill | Free |
| [Priority Ranking Skill](/products/skill-priority-ranker) | Skill | Free |
| [Vulnerability Scanner Skill](/products/skill-vuln-scanner) | Skill | Free |
| [CSV Data Cleaner Skill](/products/skill-csv-data-cleaner) | Skill | Free |
| [Clause Extraction Skill](/products/skill-clause-extractor) | Skill | Free |
| [Adaptive Learning Skill](/products/skill-adaptive-learning-module) | Skill | $99 |
| [Talent Matching Skill](/products/skill-talent-matching-module) | Skill | $129 |
| [Feature Gating Skill](/products/skill-feature-gating-module) | Skill | $119 |
| [Incident Response Skill](/products/skill-incident-response-module) | Skill | $149 |
| [Anomaly Detection Skill](/products/skill-anomaly-detection-module) | Skill | $139 |

### Agents (6 new)

| Product | Type | Price |
|---------|------|-------|
| [AI Tutor Agent](/products/agent-ai-tutor) | Agent | $399 |
| [Recruiter Automation Agent](/products/agent-recruiter-automation) | Agent | $499 |
| [Product Ops Agent](/products/agent-product-ops) | Agent | $449 |
| [SOC Sentry Agent](/products/agent-soc-sentry) | Agent | $599 |
| [Data Engineering Agent](/products/agent-data-engineering) | Agent | $549 |
| [Clinical Assistant Agent](/products/agent-clinical-assistant) | Agent | $599 |

### Utilities (10 new)

| Product | Type | Price |
|---------|------|-------|
| [Course Structure Templates](/products/utility-course-structure-templates) | Utility | Free |
| [Onboarding Flow Templates](/products/utility-onboarding-flow-templates) | Utility | Free |

### Docs & Guides (7 new)

| Product | Type | Price |
|---------|------|-------|
| [AI in Teaching Guide](/products/doc-ai-in-teaching-guide) | Doc | Free |
| [AI Recruiting Handbook](/products/doc-ai-recruiting-handbook) | Doc | Free |

---

## Free Downloads

All **30 free assets** are available for immediate download — no purchase required.

- [Lesson Plan Generator Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-lesson-plan-pack) — Prompts for generating structured lesson plans across subjects and grade levels
- [Quiz & Assessment Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-quiz-assessment-pack) — Prompts for auto-generating quizzes, rubrics, and assessment criteria
- [Job Description Writer Prompts](/products/prompt-job-description-writer) — Prompts for crafting inclusive, structured job descriptions with role requirements
- [Interview Question Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-interview-question-pack) — Behavioral and technical interview question generators for hiring teams
- [User Story Writer Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-user-story-writer) — Prompts for writing user stories with acceptance criteria and edge cases
- [Roadmap Planning Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-roadmap-planner-pack) — Prompts for generating quarterly roadmaps with prioritisation frameworks
- [Threat Modeling Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-threat-model-pack) — STRIDE and DREAD-based threat modeling prompts for security reviews
- [Audit Preparation Prompt Pack](/products/prompt-audit-prep-pack) — Prompts for preparing SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR audit documentation
- [SQL Query Generator Prompts](/products/prompt-sql-query-gen-pack) — Prompts for generating optimised SQL queries from natural language descriptions
- [Data Quality Check Prompts](/products/prompt-data-quality-check) — Prompts for identifying data anomalies, missing values, and schema drift
- [Contract Review Starter Prompts](/products/prompt-contract-review-starter) — Prompts for clause extraction, risk flagging, and obligation tracking in contracts
- [Clinical Documentation Prompts](/products/prompt-clinical-doc-pack) — Prompts for structuring clinical notes, discharge summaries, and referral letters
- [Rubric Generator Skill](/products/skill-rubric-generator) — Skill module for generating grading rubrics from learning objectives
- [Resume Parser Skill](/products/skill-resume-parser) — Skill for extracting structured data from resumes into normalised JSON
- [Priority Ranking Skill](/products/skill-priority-ranker) — RICE and WSJF scoring skill for backlog item prioritisation
- [Vulnerability Scanner Skill](/products/skill-vuln-scanner) — Skill for scanning code snippets and configs for common vulnerability patterns
- [CSV Data Cleaner Skill](/products/skill-csv-data-cleaner) — Skill for detecting and fixing common CSV data issues like encoding and delimiters
- [Clause Extraction Skill](/products/skill-clause-extractor) — Skill for extracting and categorising key clauses from legal documents
- [Course Structure Templates](/products/utility-course-structure-templates) — Templates for organising course modules, objectives, and assessment mapping
- [Onboarding Flow Templates](/products/utility-onboarding-flow-templates) — Structured onboarding checklists and 30-60-90 day plan templates
- [Sprint Planning Templates](/products/utility-sprint-planning-templates) — Sprint ceremony templates including planning, retro, and standup formats
- [Compliance Checklist Templates](/products/utility-compliance-checklist-templates) — SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance checklist templates in YAML and Markdown
- [ETL Pipeline Templates](/products/utility-etl-pipeline-templates) — Reusable ETL pipeline configs for common data source integrations
- [NDA & Agreement Templates](/products/utility-nda-agreement-templates) — Starter NDA, MSA, and SaaS agreement template scaffolds in Markdown
- [Patient Intake Form Templates](/products/utility-patient-intake-templates) — Structured patient intake and medical history form templates
- [AI in Teaching Guide](/products/doc-ai-in-teaching-guide) — Practical guide for integrating AI tools into classroom instruction and assessment
- [AI Recruiting Handbook](/products/doc-ai-recruiting-handbook) — Handbook covering AI-assisted sourcing, screening, and candidate evaluation
- [Agent-Assisted PM Guide](/products/doc-agent-assisted-pm-guide) — Guide for product managers on leveraging AI agents for research, specs, and tracking
- [AI Security Best Practices](/products/doc-ai-security-best-practices) — Security best practices for deploying LLM-based agents in production
- [DataOps Quick Start Guide](/products/doc-dataops-quickstart) — Quick start guide for implementing DataOps practices with AI-assisted pipelines

---

## Browse the Full Catalog

Head to the [catalog](/catalog) to explore all products, or check out the [free library](/free-library) to download assets at no cost.

### Data Engineering Agent
